dedup_decision.distinct_from_anysearchskill: Sirchmunk evidence is local direct file search only; AnySearchSkill remains a network external retrieval provider.
dedup_decision.distinct_from_rag_anything: Sirchmunk evidence is not cross-modal RAG, multimodal knowledge graph, embedding, vector DB, or vendor multimodal runtime.
dedup_decision.distinct_from_weknora: Sirchmunk evidence is not Auto Wiki, Knowledge Graph, or agentic RAG.
distinct_engineering_value: source trace and evidence map without vector DB or network

local_contract_evidence.build_command: python -m heitang_kb_forge.cli build-sirchmunk-direct-file-search --workspace artifacts/audits/section_5/sirchmunk_direct_file_search/sample_workspace --query "direct file search vector" --output artifacts/audits/section_5/sirchmunk_direct_file_search/search

why_real_integration: The source repository identity, HEAD, tag, and Apache-2.0 license were verified.
A local bounded direct-file-search provider candidate was implemented and validated with focused tests.
The provider returns source trace and evidence map from workspace-local files without embeddings, vector DB, network, or LLM.
Path-boundary tests reject files outside the workspace.
boundaries: No Sirchmunk repository clone, installer, official runtime, external code, external prompts, or dependencies are copied or executed.
No LLM/API key, network retrieval, vector DB, embedding index, or arbitrary shell execution is required.
This does not replace AnySearchSkill, RAG-Anything, WeKnora, or existing retrieval main chain.
Campaign 4 is still blocked by sequence.
remaining_gap: Strengthening items 5.S1-5.S3, Campaign 3 Supplement 2.0 closure, Campaign 3.0, Campaign 3 Supplement 4.0, expanded final consistency, Campaign 4-8, and release remain incomplete.
next_required_e2e_step: Process Section 5 strengthening item 5.S1 GBrain only.
